name: Rockin' 9 Golf Course & Restaurant
about: Rockin' 9 Golf Course & Restaurant is a newly renovated establishment offering a unique blend of golfing and dining experiences. The venue features modernized facilities, including a golf simulator, a spacious outdoor patio with a stage for live music, and a full restaurant and bar. It provides a casual environment for patrons to enjoy exceptional dining and exciting golfing opportunities. The venue prides itself on being the most affordable golf and best-priced golf simulator in the area, making it an accessible option for both serious practice and casual play.
why_golfers_like_it: Affordable pricing for both golf and simulator use
Unique combination of golfing and dining entertainment
State-of-the-art golf simulators for year-round play
Spacious outdoor patio with live music for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a menu featuring burgers, steaks, fish fries, Saturday Prime Rib, and rotating weekly specials. Online ordering is available.
Full bar service is available at the restaurant and bar.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs to ensure a proper fit for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Rockin' 9 has a full kitchen and bar where you can order food and drinks directly from the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but typical simulator rounds can take 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as welcoming families and provides a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages.
